positive: A minimalist, stylized portrait of a confident fox sitting amongst abstract geometric mountain peaks at dawn. The fox is rendered with clean, sharp vector lines and negative space, evoking a sense of elegant wildness and discovery. The overall aesthetic must be highly suitable for a modern apparel print, resembling clean screen print artwork or woodcut linework. Cinematic, crisp focus, strong silhouette, symmetrical balance. Mid-century modern graphic design style, high contrast, vector art, perfect symmetry.
